headlines.description: — Indiana coach Rick Carlisle put it best in summing up his team's finishing punch in the Eastern Conference semifinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pacers eliminate top-seeded Cavaliers 114-105, advance to the Eastern Conference Finals

events.name: Denver Nuggets at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 31 points, and the Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Denver Nuggets 112-105 on Tuesday night to go up 3-2 in their Western Conference semifinal series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 31 as Thunder beat Nuggets 112-105 and take 3-2 lead in West semifinals
